personalInfo.title: Software Engineer
personalInfo.summary: Passionate about learning and constantly improving skills. Strong foundation in computer science with hands-on experience in various programming languages and frameworks.

tasks: Focusing on software engineering principles and .NET development.
Contributing to the development of scalable solutions and engineering workflows.
Managed daily warehouse operations to ensure efficiency and accuracy.
Facilitated team collaboration and coordinated workflows to meet operational targets.

projects.title: Dynamic Resource Management Engine
projects.description: Multi-tenant ERP / Project Management platform built on a meta-schema (EAV) architecture. Organizations can define entities, custom fields, state-machine workflows, and role-based access control at runtime — no code changes or DB migrations required.

projects.title: Focus Forge
projects.description: Smart productivity app combining task management, habit tracking, and AI-powered daily planning. Uses on-device NLP to parse tasks and a Groq LLM to generate adaptive schedules.

projects.title: StockingApp
projects.description: High-performance inventory management system with a 'Tactile-Industrial' aesthetic and real-time synchronization.

projects.title: Flash Chat Flutter
projects.description: Real-time messaging application built with Flutter and Dart, integrating Firebase Cloud Firestore for synchronization and Firebase Authentication for secure user login.

projects.title: Spotify Album Finder
projects.description: High-performance web application using React and Vite, leveraging the Spotify Web API for album search with efficient state management.

projects.title: Clima
projects.description: Dynamic weather application using external REST APIs and geolocation services to provide real-time weather data based on user location.

projects.title: Message Board
projects.description: Full-stack message board application with RESTful routes, form validation, and secure password handling.
